description_long: This motorcycle features a vintage, streamlined design with a dark green metallic body and brass or bronze accents. The frame is elongated, with spoked wheels and a low, brown leather saddle, evoking early 20th-century motorbike aesthetics. The engine compartment is large and boxy, with visible rivets and a perforated metal side panel, suggesting an industrial, retro-futuristic style. The handlebars are straight and simple, with classic round mirrors and minimalistic controls. Both wheels are thin and have prominent spokes, while the rear section includes a small luggage rack. The overall appearance is robust and mechanical, with a blend of utilitarian and decorative elements.
description: A vintage-style motorcycle with a dark green metallic body, brass accents, spoked wheels, and a brown leather saddle. It has a large, boxy engine compartment and a retro-industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, straight handlebars, and the headlight centered above the front wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, spoked wheels, large engine compartment, and brown leather saddle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wheel, saddle, and the straight alignment of the handlebars and mirrors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the engine compartment, spoked wheels, and the brown leather seat.
